title: Better BetterX
description:
This pack replaces a few BetterX textures with ones that feel more in line with other mods/vanilla.

This pack is still useable in 1.20.1
body:
# Better BetterX
## Content
This resource pack aims to fix some inconsistencies/oddities of BetterX mods and provides parity as well as compatibilities to other mods.

When using this pack in 1.19.2 I recommend [BCLib-jsonifier](https://modrinth.com/mod/bclib-jsonifier) to fix the recipe jank!

__All textures are either taken from BetterX mods or drawn myself.__
